design.fills: closed-candle decisions, next-candle-open fills, EXEC-EV1 depth-aware friction at traded notional
design.signal: sign of trailing lookback return (30/60/90d); exact zero = flat
design.vol_targeting: equal risk budget per asset = portfolio_vol_target / N; weight = sign * min(budget / realized_vol_30d, 0.40)

train_only_choice.criterion: best train-window Sharpe under conservative friction

universe.rationale: All eight have full 889-candle 1d history (2024-01-02 -> 2026-06-08) and sit in the EXEC-EV1 major/large liquidity tiers, so modeled friction is benign at 10k sizing. HYPE excluded: mid-alt tier and ~550 candles only.
